title: viola × hyrcanica
intro: Viola × hyrcanica is a hybrid species of the violet plant, a type of flowering perennial that belongs to the Violaceae family. The medicinal properties of Viola × hyrcanica lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are used to treat various health issues. This plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, ultimately providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Viola × hyrcanica is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
